message:
feat(fwc): add mesh CLI dispatch tests and apply rustfmt formatting

Add comprehensive test coverage for the mesh command family (status,
nodes, use, target, target --clear) to verify CLI parsing and dispatch
logic. New tests exercise mesh status default state reporting, stale
active node detection, connector-target overlay, and mesh target set/
clear with persistence round-trips.

Also includes a temp_context_config() test helper for isolated context
config testing, and applies rustfmt formatting across audit_cmd,
bench_cmd, bench_helpers, mesh_targeting, and prerequisite modules.

- 20+ new tests for mesh status, nodes, use, and target dispatch
- Formatting-only changes in audit_cmd, bench_cmd, bench_helpers,
  mesh_targeting, prerequisite (line wrapping, closure formatting)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
